channel.title: Daily on Charles Ancheta
channel.description: Recent content in Daily on Charles Ancheta

item.author: cancheta.dev@gmail.com (Charles Ancheta)
item.description: I got my passport today so I am now legally allowed to leave the country 😌 I think I should start scheduling my off-work hours because I’m bad at time management and get distracted easily. It’s already past midnight that I’m writing on the journal. EDIT: I forgot to add why I wanted to do this in the first place. I found an old notebook of mine from 5+ years ago that had this entry:
